title: Senior / Interior Designer
description:
We're Hiring: Senior Interior Designer

Location: Great World City
Job Type: Full-Time | Corporate Interior Design

Are you an innovative and detail-driven designer passionate about transforming workplaces into functional, aesthetic spaces? We're looking for a skilled and experienced Senior Interior Designer to join our creative team.

What You Bring to the Table:

Creative Conceptualisation & Space Planning

  • Proven ability to conceptualise bold, functional design strategies for corporate interiors.
  • Strong command of space planning tailored to modern office workflows and aesthetics.

Client Communication & Presentation

  • Confident in client-facing roles; able to present design ideas with clarity and enthusiasm.
  • Skilled at understanding client needs and translating them into innovative design solutions.

Project Management & Coordination

  • Experienced in managing end-to-end design processes, including timeline, cost control and coordination.
  • Able to multitask and manage multiple projects simultaneously under tight deadlines.

Material & Aesthetic Expertise

  • Sharp eye for detail with excellent command of material selection, colour theory, and finishes.
  • Up to date with industry trends, workplace design standards, and sustainability practices.

Software Proficiency

  • Highly proficient in AutoCAD and Microsoft Office.
  • Familiar with 3D visualization tools is a plus.

The Ideal Candidate should possess

  • At least 5 to 8 years of experience in corporate interior design or interior architecture.
  • Holds a degree in Interior Design, Interior Architecture, or has equivalent practical experience.
  • Demonstrates a portfolio with strong corporate workplace design projects.
  • Passionate, proactive, and thrives in a fast-paced, multicultural team environment.

 Why Join Us?

  • Work on high-profile commercial projects that make a difference.
  • Collaborate with an experienced, design-led team.
  • Opportunity for leadership, creativity, and career growth.
  • Supportive work culture that values initiative and innovation.

postedCompany.description:
ID21 is a leading design and build agency specializing in the delivery of high-quality, future-ready interior environments for commercial, institutional, hospitality, retail and community spaces. Headquartered in Singapore, we bring together a multidisciplinary team of design, project management, and construction professionals committed to delivering excellence across every stage of the project lifecycle. 


With a proven track record of over two decades, we partner with organizations to transform their spatial strategies into business assets by enhancing user experience, operational efficiency, and brand presence. Our integrated approach ensures seamless coordination from design concept to construction completion, with a strong emphasis on sustainability, functionality, and innovation.


At ID21, we are guided by our core values of integrity, accountability, and forward-thinking. We take pride in fostering long-term client relationships and maintaining the highest standards of service, safety, and quality.
We operate in a fast-paced, collaborative environment where strategic thinking, precision, and leadership are highly valued. As we continue to expand, we are seeking dynamic professionals who are ready to take ownership of projects and lead with confidence.


Join ID21 and play a key role in shaping spaces that inspire performance and deliver lasting value.
postedCompany.name: ID21 PTE. LTD.
